rule: Every non-HackathonHunter skill named by this project was loaded from the installed skill path shown in the current Codex skill list.

skills.why_used: Major visual, deck, asset, and video narrative redesign decisions for the refreshed Hunter flow.
skills.evidence_summary: Returned judge-first diagnosis, frontend redesign direction, image asset plan, 12-slide Swiss deck outline, video narrative, and implementation priorities. A follow-up GPT Pro image run produced two composite evidence images; five accepted cropped assets are stored under public/art/refusalrail/ and mirrored to pitch/deck/images/generated/.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Block G3/G6 creative work and ask for user approval to proceed locally.

skills.why_used: Required premium AIDA structure, layout variance, proof bento math, and motion vocabulary for the frontend refresh.
skills.evidence_summary: Captured deterministic design_plan selections for cinematic proof cockpit, Geist typography, proof accordions, receipt rail, verdict card stack, scrubbed proof reveal, and card stacking.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Block G3 visual contract until the installed skill can be loaded.

skills.why_used: Required product-register anti-slop audit and craft constraints for a trusted financial workbench.
skills.evidence_summary: Loaded PRODUCT.md and product register; constrained the redesign to a restrained, trustworthy operational tool with no decorative dashboard tricks.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Block G3 visual contract or continue only with a logged Hunter override.

skills.why_used: Generate and select a forensic rail/receipt brand mark for the product chrome, deck, and video lockup.
skills.evidence_summary: Produced six SVG logo variants in pitch/logo-showcase/variants and shipped the selected mark as public/brand/logomark.svg, wordmark.svg, logo-mono.svg, and og assets.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Use the hand-authored temporary mark only after logging the Hunter brand-skill blocker.

skills.why_used: Rebuild the pitch deck as a single-file Swiss International Style HTML deck with registered S01-S22 layouts.
skills.evidence_summary: Selected Swiss / IKB theme, loaded template-swiss, layouts-swiss, and validator requirements. Rebuilt pitch/deck/index.html with product screenshots plus GPT Pro evidence assets; validator passed with layout warnings only.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Use plain HTML deck only after recording a Hunter blocker and user approval.

skills.why_used: Rebuild the combined pitch/demo video as an HTML motion composition with proof cards, component lifts, and a single post-render audio mux.
skills.evidence_summary: Loaded the installed HyperFrames workflow, kept the composition visual-only, rendered the 3:30 full judge video from latest product plates, and muxed one narration bus after render.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Use the existing Playwright screen recording only after logging a Hunter video-polish blocker and user approval.

skills.why_used: Apply Hunter's final copy taste gate to README, SUBMISSION, deck notes, narration source, and HackQuest-facing prose.
skills.evidence_summary: Removed generic platform language from judge-facing copy where possible, kept claims concrete, and anchored the submission around the visible refusal receipt, Arbitrum proof, and live app path.
skills.fallback_if_missing: Manually run the same directness, rhythm, trust, authenticity, and density checks before final submission.
